summary: Clinic management app with patient database, appointment dashboard, and treatment logs. User wants to lock/restrict access to the patient database and booking list.

existing_features.title: Protect the Patient Database page so that only authenticated users (logged in via Internet Identity) can view or interact with it. Unauthenticated visitors must see a locked/access-denied state with a prominent 'Login with Internet Identity' button and cannot see any patient records or the add-patient form.

Protect the Bookings List page so that only authenticated users (logged in via Internet Identity) can view it. Unauthenticated visitors must see a locked/access-denied state with a prominent 'Login with Internet Identity' button and cannot see any booking records.

Add a Login/Logout control in the shared Layout header. When the user is not authenticated, show a 'Login' button that triggers Internet Identity login. When authenticated, show the user's principal (abbreviated) and a 'Logout' button. Use the existing useInternetIdentity hook.

new_feature_requests.summary: Lock/restrict access to the patient database
Lock/restrict access to the booking/appointment list
